description_long: This object is a rectangular bamboo chopping board with a smooth, natural wood grain finish. It features a prominent slanted groove or slot on one end, likely designed for collecting food scraps or juices, and a triangular cutout on one side that may serve as a grip or hanging feature. The board has rounded corners and edges, giving it a modern and ergonomic appearance. The surface is flat and spacious, suitable for food preparation tasks. The bamboo construction suggests durability and resistance to knife marks, while also being lightweight. No visible stains, food residue, or significant wear are present, indicating it is well-maintained.
description: A rectangular bamboo chopping board with a slanted groove, triangular cutout, and smooth, rounded edges. The surface is clean and features a natural wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slanted groove and triangular cutout, highlighting the board's thickness and edge details.
description_view_1: End-on view displaying the full width and rounded corners, with the slanted groove visible at the far end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the slanted groove and triangular cutout on the left, showing the board's flat surface and edge profile.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite side, showing the rounded edge and the slanted groove at the near end.
